author: y4rr
content:
Pass 5.A.1 closed via APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS.

Behavioral fix landed:
- ssd.rs:1050-1063 — Module::forward returns dets[0].scores.clone() w/ [0, num_classes] empty-fallback (mirrors FasterRcnn/MaskRcnn convention)
- vision/registry.rs — ssd300_vgg16 registered in default_registry()
- hub/registry.rs — ModelInfo added with placeholder SHA, pretrained=true fails fast through the same path as fasterrcnn/maskrcnn
- ssd.rs:1542-1597 — discriminating test ssd300_module_forward_matches_inherent_scores added; sabotage probe confirmed it panics on the original zero-stub regression

Tests: vision/lib/ssd 12/12; hub/lib 94/94; vision/lib/registry 7/7. Build + clippy clean.

Follow-up filed: #1130 (pin SSD300 weights).
